creator: shuvaev@physik.uni-wuerzburg.de
text:
The ports graphics/xface.el and mail/x-face-e21 reference different distfiles
with the same name (x-face-e21.el.gz):

[wep4035] /usr/ports/graphics/xface.el> cat pkg-descr 
This package provides X-Face encoder/decoder/viewer for Emacsen.
[wep4035] /usr/ports/graphics/xface.el> cat distinfo 
MD5 (x-face-1.3.6.24.tar.gz) = ecb086098c478c9ff4b78ad646ce842a
SHA256 (x-face-1.3.6.24.tar.gz) = 9b94b09ce48a58a3241468236628c35dee1ad6697782936ac6d7fab17c7e414a
SIZE (x-face-1.3.6.24.tar.gz) = 82489
MD5 (x-face-e21.el.gz) = f6c5eb2e48a2ea31d7bc62ce9b3edd85
SHA256 (x-face-e21.el.gz) = ef8f660b9469534167845e1947e1bc64702e8423bdaca90c52c7590e46fed458
SIZE (x-face-e21.el.gz) = 21813

[wep4035] /usr/ports/mail/x-face-e21> cat pkg-descr
X-Face utilities for Emacs 21 (and possibly 22)

WWW: http://www.jpl.org/elips/
[wep4035] /usr/ports/mail/x-face-e21> cat distinfo
MD5 (x-face-e21.el.gz) = da5975063f2d6eddd7917b7e2c3088cb
SHA256 (x-face-e21.el.gz) = 1e0b5f88938f1db76cfc18c2ac176125693a510e9fb20e65831a3c5bf2bfc76c
SIZE (x-face-e21.el.gz) = 21930

I don't use either of them so I can't say if one of these ports is
redundant.
